steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The histogram has bars at 50-foot intervals. The maximum length in the data set must fall inside the rightmost bar that has data. Look at the histogram: the rightmost non-empty bar covers 200 ≤ length < 250. The correct answer must be a value that falls in that bin.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '69': falls in the first bar (0–49 ft). Cannot be the maximum. ✗
  • Choice B — '119': falls in the third bar (100–149 ft). Cannot be the maximum. ✗
  • Choice C — '169': falls in the fourth bar (150–199 ft). Cannot be the maximum. ✗
  • Choice D — '219': falls in the rightmost non-empty bar (200–249 ft). A valid maximum. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
